{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603221104113B49ED11F92A4F9C5D2D\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7373656292769268506","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容科学又前沿，还很有可读性。让我想到了《世界未解之谜》这本书，它们都能增加知识、开阔视野。我特别喜欢里面对各种自然现象的解读，就像一个个引人入胜的故事。这本书真的是科普阅读的好伙伴！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715704353,"group_id":"7312294115113176075","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我用坚强续写明天的谱，用执着走完未来的路。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9tc1JPWgnbSAVu36On48Xhq4NT0FJWrgumjAwkrqBcr","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a674569d10a7418b8cc75ecf93ccc63a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776706445\u0026x-signature=ZDSaGIqVNSRcrncEaF6eMzt2bpU%3D","user_id":"1539783650708013","user_name":"过去已成回忆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1539783650708013","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7312294115113176075","book_info":{"abstract":"本书主要针对广大读者的好奇和探索心理，全面介绍了自然世界存在的各种奥秘未解现象和最新探索发现，以及现代最新科技成果、科技发展等内容，具有很强的科学性、前沿性和可读性，能够启迪思考、增加知识和开阔视野，能够激发广大读者关心自然和热爱科学，以及增强探索发现和开拓创新的精神，是全民科普阅读的良师益友。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/773fb8957319b95c5d6b550932146929~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"李慕南","author_id":"","book_id":"7312294115113176075","book_name":"当自然灾难来临时","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#1098d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"9人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":52,\"name\":\"科技\",\"schema\":\"d
